container.name: docker-compose

container.name: docker
container.description: Container platform for developing, shipping, and running applications in isolated environments.

dev.name: make
dev.description: Build automation tool for compiling and managing project dependencies using Makefile-based rule definitions.

internal.name: AutoTest Knowledge Repository

network.name: scapy
network.description: Python-based packet crafting and network manipulation framework for packet generation, sniffing, protocol analysis, and network attack development.

network.name: tcpdump
network.description: Dump traffic on a network interface

network.name: ip
network.description: Show/manipulate routing, devices, policy routing and tunnels

network.name: ping
network.description: Network utility for testing reachability and measuring round-trip latency to a remote host.

network.name: traceroute
network.description: Network diagnostic tool for displaying the route and measuring transit delays of packets across an IP network.

network.name: dig
network.description: DNS lookup utility for querying name servers and debugging DNS resolution issues.

network.name: iptables
network.description: Administration tool for IPv4 firewall rules

network.name: curl
network.description: Transfers data from or to a server using supported protocols (HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, SFTP, SCP, etc.).

network.name: wget
network.description: Non-interactive download utility supporting HTTP, HTTPS, and FTP protocols with recursive download and resume capability.

network.name: ssh
network.description: Secure Shell protocol for encrypted remote login, command execution, and file transfer.

network.name: telnet
network.description: Telnet protocol client for remote connections

network.name: nc
network.description: Netcat - arbitrary TCP/UDP connections and listening

network.name: netcat
network.description: Versatile networking utility for reading/writing data across TCP and UDP connections, port scanning, and network debugging.

network.name: socat
network.description: Multipurpose relay tool for bidirectional data transfer between sockets, pipes, files, and serial ports with SSL support.

security.name: Certipy
security.description: Active Directory Certificate Services (AD CS) exploitation tool that finds vulnerable certificate templates, escrows, and performs ESC1-ESC8 attacks for domain privilege escalation.

security.name: enum4linux-ng
security.description: Python reimplementation of enum4linux for comprehensive SMB and NetBIOS enumeration of Windows and Active Directory targets.

security.name: kerbrute
security.description: Tool for performing Kerberos pre-authentication brute-forcing, user enumeration, and password spraying against Active Directory.

security.name: ldapsearch
security.description: LDAP directory search tool for querying Active Directory to enumerate users, groups, computers, organizational units, and domain policies.

security.name: psexec
security.description: Impacket psexec — Windows remote command execution via SMB service control manager for lateral movement in Active Directory environments.

security.name: rpcclient
security.description: Samba RPC client for executing MS-RPC functions against Windows systems for user, group, domain, and privilege enumeration.

security.name: rubeus
security.description: Kerberos abuse toolkit for Windows for performing AS-REP roasting, Kerberoasting, pass-the-ticket, S4U attacks, and Kerberos ticket manipulation.

security.name: secretsdump
security.description: Impacket secretsdump tool that extracts NTLM hashes, Kerberos keys, and credential material from Windows systems via NTDS.dit, SAM, and LSA techniques.

security.name: sharphound
security.description: BloodHound data collector written in C# that enumerates Active Directory relationships, ACLs, group memberships, and session information for attack path analysis.

security.name: smbclient
security.description: SMB/CIFS client for accessing and managing file shares on Windows systems, part of the Samba suite of interoperability tools.

security.name: smbmap
security.description: SMB enumeration tool that provides recursive listing, file download/upload, and command execution across SMB shares on Windows networks.

security.name: wmiexec
security.description: Impacket tool for semi-interactive remote command execution over Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) without deploying services or agents.

security.name: patator
security.description: Multi-protocol brute-forcing tool that supports FTP, SSH, HTTP, SMTP, SNMP, and many other services for login credential testing.

security.name: cewl
security.description: Custom wordlist generator that spiders websites to gather unique words for crafting targeted password lists.

security.name: crunch
security.description: Wordlist generator that produces all possible combinations and permutations of specified character sets.

security.name: cupp
security.description: Common User Passwords Profiler — generates intelligent wordlists based on personal profile information gathered from the target.

security.name: hash-identifier
security.description: Simple hash identification tool that determines the probable hash type from a given hash string.

security.name: hashcat
security.description: World's fastest password recovery tool supporting GPU acceleration, hundreds of hash types, and advanced attack modes.

security.name: hydra
security.description: Very fast parallel network logon cracker supporting numerous protocols for brute-force authentication testing.

security.name: john
security.description: Leading password cracking tool supporting hundreds of hash types with multiple cracking modes (single, wordlist, incremental, external).

security.name: medusa
security.description: Parallel network login auditor for brute-forcing authentication across multiple protocols and services.

security.name: ncrack
security.description: High-speed network authentication cracking tool for testing credential strength across multiple network services.

security.name: rsmangler
security.description: Wordlist mangling/generation tool that takes a base wordlist and applies transformation rules to create variants.

security.name: mimikatz
security.description: Post-exploitation credential extraction tool that recovers plaintext passwords, NTLM hashes, Kerberos tickets, and DPAPI keys from Windows memory and registry hives.

security.name: openssl
security.description: Comprehensive cryptographic toolkit for SSL/TLS, certificate management, encryption, hashing, and key generation.

security.name: dnsrecon
security.description: DNS enumeration script that performs SRV record discovery, subdomain bruteforce, DNSSEC testing, zone transfer attempts, and reverse DNS lookups.

security.name: slowhttptest
security.description: DoS testing tool that simulates Slow HTTP attacks including Slowloris, Slow HTTP POST, and Slow Read to test server resilience against application-layer DoS.

security.name: evil-winrm
security.description: WinRM shell for remote Windows administration and post-exploitation, supporting plaintext, pass-the-hash, and Kerberos PKINIT authentication.

security.name: beef
security.description: Browser Exploitation Framework for assessing browser security through client-side attack vectors and hooking.

security.name: covenant
security.description: .NET command and control framework for red teaming with real-time collaboration and multi-user support.

security.name: empire
security.description: PowerShell-based post-exploitation framework for staged and stageless payloads with encrypted C2 communication.

security.name: havoc
security.description: Modern post-exploitation command and control framework with a GUI interface, supporting agent communication, payload generation, and team collaboration.

security.name: merlin
security.description: Cross-platform post-exploitation C2 framework written in Go, supporting HTTP/2, gRPC, and WebSocket communication for agent management.

security.name: metasploit
security.description: Full-featured exploitation framework with thousands of modules for exploit development, payload generation, and post-exploitation.

security.name: mythic
security.description: Collaborative red team C2 framework with a web UI, multi-agent support, and extensible payload agents for post-exploitation operations.

security.name: pupy
security.description: Cross-platform remote administration and post-exploitation framework written in Python, supporting in-memory execution, multiple transports, and extensible modules.

security.name: routersploit
security.description: Router exploitation framework with modules for scanning, exploiting, and fuzzing embedded devices.

security.name: searchsploit
security.description: Command-line search tool for the Exploit-DB archive, enabling offline searching of exploits and shellcode.

security.name: setoolkit
security.description: Social Engineer Toolkit for automating credential harvesting, phishing campaigns, and payload generation.

security.name: shellter
security.description: Dynamic shellcode injection tool for creating backdoored portable executables while maintaining original functionality.

security.name: sliver
security.description: Implant-based C2 framework for adversary simulation, red team operations, and post-exploitation.

security.name: veil
security.description: Veil framework for generating Metasploit-compatible payloads that bypass common anti-virus solutions.

security.name: autopsy
security.description: GUI-based digital forensics platform built on The Sleuth Kit for disk image analysis, file carving, and timeline generation.

security.name: exiftool
security.description: Perl-based metadata reader and writer for extracting EXIF, IPTC, XMP, and other metadata from files.

security.name: foremost
security.description: File carving tool that recovers deleted files from disk images based on file headers and footers.

security.name: steghide
security.description: Steganography tool for embedding and extracting hidden data within image and audio files.

security.name: volatility
security.description: Advanced memory forensics framework for analyzing RAM dumps, extracting processes, network connections, registry hives, and artifacts.

security.name: impacket
security.description: Collection of Python classes and scripts for working with network protocols and Windows AD, including secretsdump, psexec, wmiexec, kerberoast, and NTLM relay tools.

security.name: NetExec (formerly CrackMapExec)
security.description: Post-exploitation framework for Active Directory assessment that automates enumeration, lateral movement, and attack execution against Windows domain networks.

security.name: clairvoyance
security.description: GraphQL schema enumeration tool that uses introspection queries and field suggestion brute-force to recover API schema definitions.

security.name: endlessh
security.description: SSH tar pit that slowly sends an endless banner to keep SSH clients connected, consuming their resources and preventing brute force attacks.

security.name: censys
security.description: Command-line interface to the Censys internet asset search engine for discovering exposed devices, certificates, and services across the global internet.

security.name: shodan
security.description: Command-line interface to the Shodan search engine for discovering internet-connected devices, open ports, and service banners.

security.name: whois
security.description: Domain registration and IP address lookup service for querying WHOIS databases for ownership and metadata.

security.name: loki
security.description: IOC (Indicator of Compromise) scanner that checks files and systems against threat intelligence feeds and YARA rules for malware detection.

security.name: yara
security.description: Pattern matching swiss knife for malware researchers to identify and classify malware samples based on textual or binary patterns.

security.name: Ettercap
security.description: Comprehensive MITM attack toolkit for ARP poisoning, DNS spoofing, and network traffic interception and analysis in switched LAN environments.

security.name: Responder
security.description: LLMNR, NBT-NS, and MDNS poisoner that captures NTLMv1/v2 hashes for offline cracking or relay attacks in Windows network environments.

security.name: Yersinia
security.description: Layer 2 network protocol exploitation framework for attacking STP, CDP, DTP, VTP, HSRP, and other switching and routing protocols.

security.name: amass
security.description: In-depth DNS enumeration, subdomain discovery, and attack surface mapping tool from the OWASP project.

security.name: assetfinder
security.description: Command-line tool that finds domains and subdomains potentially related to a given domain using passive sources.

security.name: BloodHound
security.description: Active Directory graph-based enumeration tool that maps relationships between users, groups, computers, and permissions to identify attack paths to domain privilege escalation.

security.name: dnsenum
security.description: Perl-based DNS enumeration tool that performs comprehensive DNS record queries, brute forcing, reverse lookups, and zone transfers.

security.name: fierce
security.description: DNS reconnaissance tool for locating non-contiguous IP space, subdomain brute forcing, and reverse DNS lookups.

security.name: maltego
security.description: Graphical link analysis and data mining tool for OSINT investigations, entity correlation, and relationship mapping.

security.name: masscan
security.description: High-speed TCP port scanner capable of scanning the entire internet in minutes, supporting banner grab, configurable rate limits, and multiple output formats.

security.name: nmap
security.description: Network discovery and security auditing scanner used for host discovery, port scanning, and service detection.

security.name: recon-ng
security.description: Full-featured reconnaissance framework with modules for OSINT, social engineering, and target profiling across dozens of data sources.

security.name: rustscan
security.description: Lightning-fast port scanner written in Rust that automatically pipes results into Nmap for service detection and scripting.

security.name: spiderfoot
security.description: Open-source intelligence automation tool that queries over 200 data sources for email, domain, IP, and web footprinting.

security.name: subfinder
security.description: Fast passive subdomain discovery tool from ProjectDiscovery that queries dozens of online sources to find valid subdomains for target domains.

security.name: sublist3r

security.name: theHarvester
security.description: OSINT tool for gathering emails, subdomains, IP addresses, and URLs from public data sources for a target domain.

security.name: unfurl
security.description: URL extraction and analysis tool by tomnomnom that parses URLs and extracts components (domains, paths, params, values) for recon and data processing.

security.name: waymore
security.description: Enhanced wayback machine URL fetcher that retrieves historical URLs from Internet Archive and filters results using customizable patterns.

security.name: binwalk
security.description: Firmware analysis tool for extracting filesystems, identifying embedded files, and scanning binary blobs for signatures.

security.name: checksec
security.description: Binary hardening checker that reports PIE, NX, RELRO, Stack Canary, and other security mitigations on ELF binaries.

security.name: cutter
security.description: Qt-based GUI for radare2 providing disassembly, decompilation (via Ghidra/rz-ghidra), and debugging capabilities.

security.name: gdb
security.description: GNU Project debugger for analyzing program execution, reverse engineering binaries, and debugging crashes.

security.name: ghidra
security.description: NSA's reverse engineering framework with disassembly, decompilation, debugging, and scriptable analysis.

security.name: ltrace
security.description: Library call tracer for monitoring dynamic library calls made by a running program.

security.name: pwntools
security.description: Python CTF framework and exploit development library for binary exploitation, shellcode generation, and ROP chain building.

security.name: radare2
security.description: Advanced reverse engineering framework for binary analysis, disassembly, debugging, and patching with scriptable console.

security.name: ropgadget
security.description: Tool for finding ROP (Return-Oriented Programming) gadgets in binaries for building ROP chains.

security.name: strace

security.name: gitleaks

security.name: sqlninja

security.name: chisel

security.name: aquatone
security.description: Tool for automatic visual inspection and screenshot capture of websites across large attack surfaces.

security.name: arjun
security.description: HTTP parameter discovery tool that finds hidden GET/POST parameters by analyzing server responses.

security.name: burpsuite
security.description: Integrated platform for web application security testing with proxy, scanner, intruder, repeater, and decoder tools.

security.name: cmsmap

security.name: commix
security.description: Automated command injection exploitation tool for testing and exploiting OS command injection vulnerabilities.

security.name: crlfuzz
security.description: Fast CRLF injection scanner written in Go that detects HTTP response splitting and header injection vulnerabilities.

security.name: dalfox
security.description: Fast parameter analysis and XSS scanner written in Go with WAF detection, mining, and multi-format output.

security.name: dirsearch
security.description: Advanced web path and content discovery tool for brute-forcing directories and files on web servers.

security.name: dotdotpwn
security.description: Directory traversal fuzzing tool that tests for path traversal vulnerabilities in web applications and services via HTTP, FTP, and TFTP protocols.

security.name: feroxbuster

security.name: ffuf

security.name: gau

security.name: ghauri
security.description: Advanced SQL injection detection and exploitation tool written in Go with support for multiple DBMS and injection techniques.

security.name: gobuster
security.description: Multi-purpose brute-force tool for directory/file discovery, DNS subdomain enumeration, and cloud bucket enumeration.

security.name: h2csmuggler
security.description: HTTP/2 cleartext smuggling tool that exploits connection upgrade to smuggle requests through reverse proxies and load balancers.

security.name: httpx
security.description: Fast and multi-purpose HTTP toolkit from ProjectDiscovery for probing, analyzing, and fingerprinting web servers and services.

security.name: jdam
security.description: JSON fuzzer that tests REST APIs and JSON endpoints for input validation vulnerabilities, schema bypass, and injection flaws.

security.name: joomscan
security.description: Joomla CMS vulnerability scanner that detects component versions, known vulnerabilities, and security misconfigurations.

security.name: kadimus
security.description: LFI (Local File Inclusion) scanning and exploitation tool that detects file inclusion vulnerabilities and leverages them for RCE and file reading.

security.name: katana
security.description: Fast web crawler and spider from ProjectDiscovery for discovering endpoints, assets, and attack surface.

security.name: lfi-suite
security.description: Local File Inclusion exploitation suite that automates LFI detection, file reading, RCE via log poisoning, and PHP wrapper attacks.

security.name: nikto
security.description: Web server scanner that tests for dangerous files, outdated server software, and misconfigurations on web servers.

security.description: Tool for mining parameters from web archives to discover hidden endpoints, GET/POST parameters, and potential injection points.

security.name: smuggler
security.description: HTTP request smuggling scanner that detects and tests for CL.TE, TE.CL, and TE.TE smuggling vulnerabilities in web servers and proxies.

security.name: sqlmap
security.description: Automatic SQL injection detection and exploitation tool with support for all major DBMS and injection techniques.

security.name: tplmap
security.description: Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) exploitation tool that automates detection and exploitation of template injection vulnerabilities across multiple template engines.

security.name: waybackurls
security.description: Tool for fetching historical URLs from the Wayback Machine archive for discovering endpoints, parameters, and attack surface of target domains.

security.name: wfuzz
security.description: Web application bruteforcer for discovering hidden resources, parameter fuzzing, and content discovery.

security.name: whatweb
security.description: Next-generation web server fingerprinting tool that identifies CMS platforms, frameworks, and technologies.

security.name: wpscan
security.description: Black-box WordPress vulnerability scanner that detects themes, plugins, users, and security misconfigurations.

security.name: xsstrike
security.description: Advanced XSS detection suite with context-aware payload generation, WAF detection/evasion, and DOM XSS scanning.

security.name: owasp-zap
security.description: OWASP Zed Attack Proxy — open-source web application security scanner for finding vulnerabilities in web applications and APIs.

security.description: Complete suite for monitoring, attacking, testing, and cracking WiFi networks, including WEP and WPA/WPA2-PSK.

security.name: bettercap
security.description: Powerful MITM framework for WiFi, Bluetooth, and wired network attacks with an interactive command console.

security.name: bluetoothctl
security.description: Command-line Bluetooth controller for device scanning, pairing, and management via BlueZ.

security.name: btlejack
security.description: Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) sniffing and jamming tool for security assessments of BLE devices.

security.name: bully
security.description: WPS brute-force attack tool similar to Reaver but with improved reliability and performance.

security.name: kismet

security.name: reaver
